roa.docketEntryComment: PROBATION TRANSFER TO SONOMA CO SENT

/CAL: APD 1203,9PC  MOTION TO TRANSFER OUT PROBATION FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY TO SONOMA COUNTY/MO GRTD/CTORD: PROBATION IS TRANSFERRED FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY TO SONOMA  COUNTY/X:COURT ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED,/

/CAL:SENTENCE/X:COURT AND BOTH COUNSELS AGREE THAT THE PSR DOES NOT INDICATED THE CORRECT SENTENCE THAT WAS AGREED UPON/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 2 Y:PJ 324D/CTS:324/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/IND/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DTC/RESTV/WS/WEAP/X:COURT STATES ON THE RECORD THAT THIS CHARGE DOES NOT REQUIRE THE DEFENDANT TO REGISTER AS A SEX OFFENDER/X:AGREEMENT TO SPECIAL CONDITIONS OF PROBATION - SEX OFFENDERS (DATED  JUNE 17, 2021) IS SIGNED BY DEFENDANT & FILED/ /X:DEFENDANT UNDERSTANDS AND AGREES TO ABIDE BY THE TERMS: AGREEMENT TO SPECIAL CONDITIONS OF PROBATION - SEX OFFENDERS/

/CAL DISPO/X THE PEOPLE ORALLY AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 007, A VILATION OF PENAL CODE SECTION 664 261,5(D), A FELONY/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:007/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:08-18-21/PPRF/REMA/ARBUCKLE/TWS/CTORD:ELECTRONICMONITORING IS HEREBY TERMINATED/CONTD:SENTENCING/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/987,2/ORNAS/X:RELEASE CONDITIONS SIGNED AND FILED/X:SEE SIGNED ORDERIN FILE,/ /CONTD: ELECTRONIC MONITORING CONFIRMATION/X:DAW IF ATTY CONFIRMS E,M,/
/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE, TO SET-DISPO/DAWT/CONT/DOPU: NO DISPOSITION/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DAWT/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE (TO SET/DISPO)/X:DAW IF NO DISPO/
/CAL:ELECTRONIC MONITORING CONFIRMATION/DAWT/X:DEFENDANT CONFIRMED HE HASGPS DEVICE ATTACHED/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOPU:NO DISPOSITION/
